title: Sine
description: A pure sine wave. Adjust frequency and amplitude.

title: FM synthesis
description: Two-operator FM. Modulator frequency = carrier * ratio. Push depth up for harshness.

title: AM synthesis
description: Amplitude modulation: a slow modulator at audio rate becomes ring-mod-like.

title: Subtractive (saw + filter)
description: A bright phasor saw shaped by a one-pole lowpass.

title: Additive (4 partials)
description: Sum of fundamental + 2x + 3x + 4x partials, each with its own gain.

title: Feedback delay
description: Sine into a delwrite~/delread~ pair with adjustable time and feedback.

title: Multi-tap reverb
description: Four delay taps summed and fed back. Decay controls tail length.

title: Metro pulses
description: Toggle play to start. A metro fires short pulses at a sine.

title: Random melody
description: Each metro tick picks a random pitch within a MIDI range.

title: Arpeggio
description: Cycles a fixed 8-step arpeggio. Shift root in semitones.

title: Probability rhythm
description: Each metro tick has a configurable chance of triggering.

title: Drum machine
description: Filtered noise bursts. Tune hit_freq + resonance for kick, snare, hat-like sounds.

title: Drone
description: Three slightly detuned sines. Spread controls beating speed.
